utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format includes 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget (so total = 7 items). Checking the final package: 
1. destination – included and fully specified (Lisbon, Portugal). 
2. travel_dates – included and fully specified (2024-07-01 to 2024-07-05). 
3. transportation – included; has flight details (airline, class, airports, cost, baggage, cancellation), so fully specified. 
4. accommodation – included; hotel name, type, cost, amenities, breakfast, wifi, so fully specified. 
5. activities – included; list and total cost, so fully specified. 
6. additional_services – included; travel insurance and dietary needs, so fully specified. 
7. total_budget – included; total cost, currency, and remaining budget, so fully specified. All 7 items are present and complete.
